title: 3-in-1 Butterfly Can Opener Stainless Steel Heavy Duty Manual Multipurpose Can Opener Comfortable Handle Easy to Use Ideal for Every Kitchen Camping with Good Grip
features: 🥫 EASY BUTTERFLY DESIGN: Effortlessly open cans with a user-friendly butterfly design that ensures smooth operation. The intuitive design makes this tin opener easy to use for all skill levels, providing convenience in the kitchen.

👌 DURABLE AND STURDY: Built to last, this butterfly tin opener features a durable construction that can withstand regular use. The sturdy materials and robust design ensure longevity, making it a reliable kitchen tool for years to come.

🧽 EASY TO CLEAN: Simplify kitchen cleanup with a tin opener that is easy to clean. The butterfly tin opener's design allows for quick and hassle-free cleaning, maintaining hygiene and ensuring a pristine kitchen environment.

👌 MULTIFUNCTIONAL USE: Explore versatile applications with a tin opener that can handle various can sizes. From small to large cans, this butterfly tin opener is designed to accommodate different shapes and sizes, offering flexibility in your kitchen tasks.
description: Product Description Kansai Convenience 3-in-1 Butterfly Can Opener 3 In 1 Design - Multi purpose tin opener including a soft handle for ease of use and a bottle opener to open your favourite bottle of refreshment. Heavy Duty - Made from high quality stainless to ensure durability and provide you help opening your favourite tinned foods over a long period of time. This tin opener can open tins of many shapes and sizes making it ideal for use in the home or on camping trips. Easy To Use - Simply secure to the top of the lid and turn the handle, our cutting wheel will do the heavy work for you. 3 In 1 Butterfly Tin Opener Designed with the goal of providing an easy to use great value tin opener, this product benefits from durability of its stainless steel material and the convenience of its multi purpose bottle opener. Perfect to take on camping trips or for opening tins and cans around the house, it has you covered for all occasions. Sit back and let this can opener do the heavy work for you. 3 In 1 Butterfly Tin Opener Designed with the goal of providing an easy to use great value tin opener, this product benefits from durability of its stainless steel material and the convenience of its multi purpose bottle opener. Kansai Convenience We are a small business based in the U.K, inspired by a trip to Japan seeing the convenience offered by local convenience stores we aim to provide the same level of value and convenience but online. Providing all your daily essentials.
